steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The follow-up sentence is decisive: “alterations maples may undergo in response to a changing climate.” This reveals that the blank should express how maples respond to climate variation.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Adapt to” is the fitting phrase—it describes an organism adjusting itself to new conditions, exactly matching the passage's discussion of alterations maples undergo. The other three are incorrect: “relocate from” suggests unnecessary movement (contradicting that maples thrive everywhere), while “refer to” and “originate from” are nonsensical in biological context. That matches choice D — D is correct.
